query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, s3Key, s3Url, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('analysis', 'ford', 'EDC17_MG1', '2022', 'busmaster_ezlynk_comparison', 'txt', 0, NULL, NULL, 'BUSMASTER flash log comparison: Stock vs EZLynk modified 2022 Ford 6.7L Powerstroke. EZLynk uses seed-key algorithm (not bypass), patches 16KB security region at 0x70000000 before writing modified calibration. Full UDS sequence reconstructed.', '{"securityLevel":"0x01","seedLen":16,"keyLen":18,"calRegions":["0x80080000-1.5MB","0x80200000-2MB","0x80400000-2MB","0x80600000-1MB","0x80700000-1MB"],"securityRegion":"0x70000000-16KB","canIds":{"request":"0x7E0","response":"0x7E8","broadcast":"0x7DF"},"transferBlockSize":4095}'),
('calibration', 'cummins', 'CM2150_ISBe', NULL, 'MoreCummins_CM2150_ISBe', 'ecfg', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Additional Cummins CM2150 ISBe calibration (BBX 8.53.0.71)', '{"ecuFamily":"CM2150","engine":"ISBe","variant":"BBX"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins', 'CM2150_ISL', NULL, 'MoreCummins_CM2150_ISL', 'ecfg', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Additional Cummins CM2150 ISL calibration (BDO 31.12.6.7)', '{"ecuFamily":"CM2150","engine":"ISL","variant":"BDO"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins', 'CM2200_ISB', NULL, 'MoreCummins_CM2200_ISB_RAM', 'ecfg', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Additional Cummins CM2200 ISB RAM Trucks calibration with TXT (BCA 22.10.5.36)', '{"ecuFamily":"CM2200","engine":"ISB 6.7","vehicle":"RAM","variant":"BCA"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins', 'CM2250_ISB', NULL, 'MoreCummins_CM2250_ISB', 'ecfg', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Additional Cummins CM2250 ISB calibrations (BBN series, 4 versions + BootConfig.e2m)', '{"ecuFamily":"CM2250","engine":"ISB","variant":"BBN","fileCount":5}'),
('calibration', 'cummins', 'CM2250_ISL', NULL, 'MoreCummins_CM2250_ISL', 'ecfg', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Additional Cummins CM2250 ISL calibrations (BBP series + AP90031)', '{"ecuFamily":"CM2250","engine":"ISL","variant":"BBP","fileCount":5}'),
('training', 'cummins', NULL, NULL, '2018_mode6_I6_Cummins_FINAL', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Cummins Mode 6 I6 diagnostic reference (2018)', '{"topic":"Mode 6 diagnostics","engine":"I6 Cummins"}'),
('training', 'cummins', NULL, NULL, 'Cummins_HPCR_Diesel_Fuel_System', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Cummins HPCR Diesel Fuel System reference (8169903106)', '{"topic":"HPCR fuel system","partNumber":"8169903106"}'),
('training', 'cummins', NULL, NULL, 'Cummins_HPCR_Fuel_System_Diagnosis', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Cummins HPCR Diesel Fuel System Diagnosis (8169901157)', '{"topic":"HPCR fuel system diagnosis","partNumber":"8169901157"}'),
('training', 'cummins', NULL, NULL, 'cummins_secrets_better_fuel_economy', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Cummins Secrets of Better Fuel Economy', '{"topic":"fuel economy optimization"}'),
('training', 'cummins', NULL, NULL, 'Diesel_OBDII_Fuel_Systems_DEF_Supplement', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Diesel OBDII Fuel Systems - DEF Supplement (8169906014sup)', '{"topic":"OBDII DEF systems","partNumber":"8169906014sup"}'),
('training', 'cummins', NULL, NULL, 'Engine_Diagnosis_Phase1_Student_Workbook', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Cummins Engine Diagnosis Phase 1 Student Workbook (2008, 8169908040)', '{"topic":"engine diagnosis training","partNumber":"8169908040","year":"2008"}'),
('training', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'AdvancedEnginePerformanceTroubleshooting', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Advanced Engine Performance Troubleshooting Techniques', '{"topic":"advanced engine diagnostics and troubleshooting"}'),
('training', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'Re-mappingcourse', 'pdf', 0, NULL, NULL, 'ECU Remapping Course - comprehensive training material for Knox', '{"topic":"ECU remapping training"}');
